outcomes.text: A ML training and validation approach is specified.
The data set for ML training and ML validation is created.
The ML model, including hyperparameter values, is optimized to meet the defined ML requirements.
Consistency and bidirectional traceability are established between the ML training and validation data set and the ML data requirements.
Results of optimization are summarized, and the trained ML model is agreed and communicated to all affected parties.

basePractices.title: Specify ML training and validation approach
basePractices.description: Specify an approach which supports the training and validation of the ML model to meet the defined ML requirements. The ML training and validation approach includes • entry and exit criteria of the training and validation, • approaches for hyperparameter tuning / optimization, • approach for data set creation and modification, and • training and validation environment robustification methods. (MLE.3). The term “validation” has a different meaning than VAL.1.

basePractices.title: Create ML training and validation data set
basePractices.description: Select data from the ML data collection provided by SUP.11 and assign them to the data set for training and validation of the ML model according to the specified ML training and validation approach. normal cases depending on the ML requirements. fold cross validation, no optimization of hyperparameters).

basePractices.title: Create and optimize ML model
basePractices.description: Create the ML model according to the ML architecture and train it, using the identified ML training and validation data set according to the ML training and validation approach to meet the defined ML requirements, and training and validation exit criteria.
